prompt: Intimate editorial close-up, 16:9. A premium iPhone Pro flat on a dark matte desk surface, screen facing up, displaying a 5-star Google review notification — five gold stars visible, review text in clean typography below them. Surrounding the phone on the dark surface: a small handwritten thank-you card on cream paper with a burgundy ink stamp in the corner, and a single espresso cup with crema. Warm amber directional light from upper left. Deep shadows, moody and intimate. Color palette: #0a0a0a surface, warm gold #c8963e star color, #f5f0e8 card, #7a1c1c stamp. 85mm macro lens, f/2.0, ISO 300. Hyper-realistic ceramic cup texture, real paper card with subtle fibres, phone screen pixel clarity. The mood is gratitude and business credibility. No people, no bright backgrounds. Documentary realism.
negative_prompt: cartoon, CGI, plastic, bright daylight, oversaturated, people, faces, neon, colorful background, stock photo, flat lighting, blurry elements, generic phone
